candidates.why: Unique current debt-related line representing current portion of long-term debt; cleaner than the duplicated borrowings label for unambiguous extraction.

variables.notes: R:c. The balance sheet shows a current-section line 'Interest-bearing loans and borrowings', which would normally be preferred for STD, but the exact row label is duplicated for both non-current and current borrowings, making it ambiguous without row position. Chose the unique current-maturities label as a conservative identifiable proxy; manual review recommended.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Direct PPE total line; gross rather than net, but semantically the clearest reported PPE total available.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Accumulated Depreciation & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset, not PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Purchase of property, plant, and equipments
candidates.why: Capex cash flow, not balance-sheet PPE stock.
Intangible asset, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Net - Total - Balancing value
candidates.why: Net PPE label but appears to be a balancing value with zeros; less reliable than gross total.

variables.notes: R:c. Selected the explicit total PPE line from the balance sheet. Although values are only shown in older columns, the label is the best semantic match.
